runTitle: Production broad QA - 8.11.20 AI hardening verification
coveredSurfaces: landing render and version badge on production v8.11.20
/main redirects to / on production v8.11.20
/login render with Google/GitHub/email/guest entry
/privacy render with back-link to login
404 route returns expected 404 page on production
system start flow transitions to /dashboard
dashboard summary render with live totals and resource cards
active alerts modal render with critical/warning counts
active alert AI action opens sidebar with prefilled prompt
AI sidebar response completes for cache-redis-dc1-01 memory alert
AI sidebar surfaces routing-timeout fallback notice before successful Analyst recovery
AI sidebar analysis basis detail shows tools summary and recent 1 hour window
/dashboard/ai-assistant fullscreen workspace restores the carried conversation
fullscreen AI workspace exposes AI process with detectAnomalies/correlateMetrics/findRootCause steps
server detail modal supports 3-tab switch
server detail modal closes on ESC
Analyst 전체 분석 flow completes and renders issue/trend breakdown
/api/health 200 on production with database/cache/ai connected
/api/version 200 on production with version 8.11.20 / nextjs 16.1.6 / environment production
console 0 error / 0 warning across landing, dashboard, sidebar, fullscreen AI routes during normal flow
mobile dashboard at 390px has no horizontal overflow and keeps cards readable
mobile AI assistant at 390px has no horizontal overflow and keeps chat composer accessible

expertAssessments.rationale: Core routes, dashboard, modal interactions, AI sidebar/fullscreen, analyst flow, and mobile responsive spot checks were validated in one production browser session.
The production AI path answered the active alert prompt, exposed fallback status to the user, and preserved the conversation plus process steps after fullscreen handoff.
The alert-driven workflow, analysis basis summary, and analyst issue drilldown all rendered without console noise on normal routes, confirming the release remains observable and operator-friendly.
Production Vercel deployment dpl_8Th4eohuqf6tGKxqt1G4Vro6WRcr and Cloud Run ai-engine 8.11.20 both reported healthy while usage stayed within the expected budget envelope.

usageChecks.summary: Current billing period reviewed after production QA; effective usage 11.0956 USD, billed 0.0000 USD. No unexpected usage spike was observed.

completedImprovements.title: Verify production AI hardening release on v8.11.20
completedImprovements.evidence: Production broad QA confirmed healthy frontend/backend pair on v8.11.20, alert-driven AI response success, and visible routing-timeout fallback recovery in the shipped assistant UI.
completedImprovements.note: The observed fallback notice is expected recovery behavior, not a user-facing failure.

wontFixImprovements.title: Review dashboard mobile header density around AI CTA and profile cluster
wontFixImprovements.overengineeringScope: Current mobile header is functional and overflow-free, so visual retuning is optional rather than a release gate.
wontFixImprovements.evidence: 390px dashboard screenshot shows no layout break, but the glowing AI CTA visually dominates the compact top bar.
wontFixImprovements.note: Consider reducing glow weight or spacing the CTA/profile controls on a later UI polish pass.
wontFixImprovements.policyNote: 포트폴리오 운영성 우선 규칙: 비차단 항목은 과도한 개선을 방지하기 위해 WONT-FIX 처리합니다.

notes: Normal production routes stayed console-clean; the only console error observed during the session came from the intentionally invalid 404 route and is not treated as a product regression.
The active-alert AI workflow exposed '라우팅 타임아웃, Analyst Agent로 전환...' before returning a grounded answer, which confirms the recent fallback-status visibility improvement is reflected in production.
Responsive spot checks at 390px confirmed no horizontal overflow on dashboard or AI assistant, and the mobile AI composer remained reachable without layout collapse.
